---
title: "Le cadre IIIF"
subtitle: "**WIAI** - **W**ebinaires de l'**I**nformatique pour l'**A**rchéométrie à l'**I**RAMAT"
author:
  - name: Thomas Huet
    affiliation: 
      - id: cnrs
        name: <span style="font-size:17pt">IRAMAT-CNRS</span>
title-slide-attributes:
    data-background-image: "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/iramat/iramat-dev/master/img/ana-xrf-pymca-ex.png"
    data-background-size: "90%"
    data-background-opacity: "0.2"
    data-notes: Lorem
format:
  revealjs: 
    css: https://zoometh.github.io/thomashuet/css/quarto.css
    controls: true
    auto-stretch: false
    code-fold: false
    code-summary: "<small>Code</small>"
    slide-number: true
    chalkboard:
      theme: "whiteboard"
      color: ['rgba(255, 0, 0, 0.3)'] # red
    scrollable: true
    preview-links: auto
    reference-location: document
    footnotes-hover: true
    # self-contained: true
    # embed-resources: true
    # logo: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/zoometh/neonet/master/doc/img/neonet.png
    footer: "T. Huet - <img src='https://raw.githubusercontent.com/zoometh/thomashuet/master/img/inst-cnrs-iramat.png' style='height: 15px;vertical-align: middle;'> - 10 Mars, 2026, LAPA, Saclay"
    margin: 0
    width: 1200
---

```{r, echo=FALSE}
library(dplyr)
library(kableExtra)
```

# Introduction générale {background-image="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/iramat/iramat-dev/master/img/iiif-pres-collection-multi.png" background-opacity=0.2 background-size="400px" background-repeat="repeat"}


## La série WIAI

:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="55%"}

Webinaires dédiés aux technologies de l'information pour l'archéométrie:  <br>
GitHub <img src='https://raw.githubusercontent.com/zoometh/thomashuet/master/img/app-github.png' style='height: 45px;vertical-align: middle;'>, Python
<img src='https://raw.githubusercontent.com/zoometh/thomashuet/master/img/app-prg-python-2.png' style='height: 45px;vertical-align: middle;'>, R
<img src='https://raw.githubusercontent.com/zoometh/thomashuet/master/img/prog-r-1.png' style='height: 45px;vertical-align: middle;'>, API 
<img src='https://raw.githubusercontent.com/zoometh/thomashuet/master/img/web-api.jpeg' style='height: 45px;vertical-align: middle;'>, IIIF
<img src='https://raw.githubusercontent.com/zoometh/thomashuet/master/img/lod-iso-iiif.png' style='height: 45px;vertical-align: middle;'>, etc. <br><br>

::: {.callout-note}
📅 Bimestriel. Le 2<sup>e</sup> Mardi matin, sur Rendez-Vous (Renater) entre 10h00 et 10h50 (50 minutes), lien sur le [GitHub](https://github.com/iramat#-wiai) et le [calendrier](https://iramat-apps.cnrs.fr/portal/#calendar) de l'IRAMAT
:::

:::

::: {.column width="45%"}

<center>

<img src='https://raw.githubusercontent.com/zoometh/thomashuet/master/img/lod-iso-iiif-tom-cramer-2016.png' style='width: 450px;vertical-align: middle;'> 

<div class="captiontext"> _"What if deep zoom was standard and fast"_ <br> &nbsp; -- Tom Cramer[^89], 2016. crédit: IIIF Consortium</div>


</center>

[^89]: _Chief developer_ de la _Stanford University Libraries_, image extraite du [_International Image Interoperability Framework event_](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=KVUyhcVO060&t=414s), Museum of Modern Art, New York, 10 Mai 2016.  

:::

:::

::: {.notes}
Découvrir -- ou approfondir -- une solution logicielle open-source en revenant sur l'histoire de ce logiciel, sa logique interne, ... Avec des citations rigolotes
:::




# Introduction {background-image="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/iramat/iramat-dev/master/img/iiif-pres-collection-multi.png" background-opacity=0.2 background-size="400px" background-repeat="repeat"}

## Des images pour les archéologues

<br><br>

:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="22%"}

<img src='https://raw.githubusercontent.com/zoometh/thomashuet/master/img/sci-archaeo-carpologist.png' style='width: 750px;vertical-align: middle;'>
<div class="captiontext">Identification/comptage des graines (INRAP/MNHN 2023)</div>
:::

::: {.column width="75%"}



<img src='https://raw.githubusercontent.com/zoometh/thomashuet/master/img/sci-archaeo-carpologist-ai-ml.png' style='width: 950px;vertical-align: middle;'>
<div class="captiontext">Apprentissage machine pour la détermination des espèces domestiquées/non domestiquées (Bonhomme _et al._ 2025)</div>

:::

::::


## IIIF: standard d'intéropérabilité des images

::: {.panel-tabset}

### Définition

<center>

<img src='https://raw.githubusercontent.com/zoometh/thomashuet/master/img/lod-iso-iiif.png' style='height: 150px;vertical-align: middle;'> 

<span class="largetext"><span style="color: #0f7ca7">International </span><span style="color: #ea2026">Image </span><span style="color: #0f7ca7">Interoperability </span><span style="color: #ea2026">Framework</span>
<br> <br> 
</center>

::: {.callout-note}
Développé au début des années 2010 (_community lead_), `ISO 21127:2019`.
:::


### Motivation


:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="65%"}
Communautés d'utilisateurs et de développeurs issues des musées, bibliothèques, archives, universités, etc., nécessitant partager des images haute résolution, des annotations, des pratiques de nommage, etc.<br><br>
<p style="text-align: center;"><b>≠ silo de données  </b></p>

:::

::: {.column width="35%"}
<img src='https://raw.githubusercontent.com/zoometh/thomashuet/main/img/lod-iso-iiif-api-no.png' style='width: 300px;vertical-align: middle;'>
:::

::::

### Fonctionnement

:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="65%"}
Les images <img src='https://raw.githubusercontent.com/zoometh/thomashuet/master/img/lod-iso-iiif.png' style='height: 55px;vertical-align: middle;'> existent à **un endroit** \
🍃 baisse des coûts de stockage \
🔍 image indexée par une URL[^1] \
✒️ meilleure gestion des réutilisations \
🎮 meilleure expérience utilisateur \
🏷️ sémantisation de régions de l'image \
👥 aggrégation de collections (APIs partagées)
:::

::: {.column width="35%"}
<img src='https://raw.githubusercontent.com/zoometh/thomashuet/main/img/lod-iso-iiif-api-yes.png' style='width: 300px;vertical-align: middle;'>

:::

::::

### Eléments clefs

:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="40%"}
<div class="captiontext"><em>Image source[^4]</em></div>
```{=html}
<div style="display: flex; justify-content: center; align-items: center; width: 100%;">
  <img
    src="https://iramat-apps.cnrs.fr/iiif/2/numismatic%2F1986.416_obv.JPG/full/full/0/default.jpg"
    alt="source image"
    style="max-width: 600px; max-height: 400px; object-fit: contain;"
  />
</div>
<br>
```

:::

::: {.column width="60%"}
<div class="captiontext"><em>manifest</em>[^5]</div>
```{=html}
<div class="iframe-figure">
  <iframe width="800" height="400"
          src="https://iramat-apps.cnrs.fr/iiif/mirador/cdn/numismatic/1986.416.json"
          title="manifest JSON"></iframe>
</div>
<br>
```
:::

::::

:::


[^1]: Uniform Resource Locator (URL) `->` Uniform Resource Identifiers (URI)
[^4]: <https://iramat-apps.cnrs.fr/iiif/2/numismatic%2F1986.416_obv.JPG/full/full/0/default.jpg>
[^5]: <https://iramat-apps.cnrs.fr/iiif/mirador/cdn/numismatic/1986.416.json>

# Image API {background-image="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/iramat/iramat-dev/master/img/iiif-pres-collection-multi.png" background-opacity=0.2 background-size="400px" background-repeat="repeat"}

## Technologies {data-visibility=hidden}

:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="50%"}
lod-iso-iiif-api-iapi-cantaloupe
:::

::: {.column width="50%"}
:::

::::

## Image source (default)

<span class="smalltext">[<span style="color: #b0afaf">https://iramat-apps.cnrs.fr/iiif/2/numismatic%2F1986.416_obv.JPG</span>/full/full/0/default.jpg](https://iramat-apps.cnrs.fr/iiif/2/numismatic%2F1986.416_obv.JPG/full/full/0/default.jpg)</span>
```{=html}
<div style="display: flex; justify-content: center; align-items: center; width: 100%;">
  <img
    src="https://iramat-apps.cnrs.fr/iiif/2/numismatic%2F1986.416_obv.JPG/full/full/0/default.jpg"
    alt="source image"
    style="max-width: 800px; max-height: 450px; object-fit: contain;"
  />
</div>
```

## Image source (region)

<span class="smalltext">[<span style="color: #b0afaf">https://iramat-apps.cnrs.fr/iiif/2/numismatic%2F1986.416_obv.JPG/</span>889,806,1697,635<span style="color: #b0afaf">/full/0/default.jpg</span>](https://iramat-apps.cnrs.fr/iiif/2/numismatic%2F1986.416_obv.JPG/889,806,1697,635/full/0/default.jpg)</span>
```{=html}
<div style="display: flex; justify-content: center; align-items: center; width: 100%;">
  <img
    src="https://iramat-apps.cnrs.fr/iiif/2/numismatic%2F1986.416_obv.JPG/889,806,1697,635/full/0/default.jpg"
    alt="source image"
    style="max-width: 800px; max-height: 450px; object-fit: contain;"
  />
</div>
```

## Image source (scale)

<span class="smalltext">[<span style="color: #b0afaf">https://iramat-apps.cnrs.fr/iiif/2/numismatic%2F1986.416_obv.JPG/full/</span>pct:7<span style="color: #b0afaf">/0/default.jpg</span>](https://iramat-apps.cnrs.fr/iiif/2/numismatic%2F1986.416_obv.JPG/full/pct:7/0/default.jpg)</span>
```{=html}
<div style="display: flex; justify-content: center; align-items: center; width: 100%;">
  <img
    src="https://iramat-apps.cnrs.fr/iiif/2/numismatic%2F1986.416_obv.JPG/full/pct:7/0/default.jpg"
    alt="source image"
    style="max-width: 800px; max-height: 450px; object-fit: contain;"
  />
</div>
```

## Image source (rotation)

<span class="smalltext">[<span style="color: #b0afaf">https://iramat-apps.cnrs.fr/iiif/2/numismatic%2F1986.416_obv.JPG/full/full/</span>180<span style="color: #b0afaf">/default.jpg</span>](https://iramat-apps.cnrs.fr/iiif/2/numismatic%2F1986.416_obv.JPG/full/full/180/default.jpg)</span>
```{=html}
<div style="display: flex; justify-content: center; align-items: center; width: 100%;">
  <img
    src="https://iramat-apps.cnrs.fr/iiif/2/numismatic%2F1986.416_obv.JPG/full/full/180/default.jpg"
    alt="source image"
    style="max-width: 800px; max-height: 450px; object-fit: contain;"
  />
</div>
```

## Image source (quality)

<span class="smalltext">[<span style="color: #b0afaf">https://iramat-apps.cnrs.fr/iiif/2/numismatic%2F1986.416_obv.JPG/full/full/0/</span>gray.jpg](https://iramat-apps.cnrs.fr/iiif/2/numismatic%2F1986.416_obv.JPG/full/full/0/gray.jpg)</span>
```{=html}
<div style="display: flex; justify-content: center; align-items: center; width: 100%;">
  <img
    src="https://iramat-apps.cnrs.fr/iiif/2/numismatic%2F1986.416_obv.JPG/full/full/0/gray.jpg"
    alt="source image"
    style="max-width: 800px; max-height: 450px; object-fit: contain;"
  />
</div>
```

# Presentation API {background-image="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/iramat/iramat-dev/master/img/iiif-pres-collection-multi.png" background-opacity=0.2 background-size="400px" background-repeat="repeat"}

## Image

<span class="smalltext"><https://iramat-apps.cnrs.fr/view/acies/arl-x-s-1_side-1.html></span>
```{=html}
<div class="iframe-figure">
  <iframe width="1200" height="420"
          src="https://iramat-apps.cnrs.fr/view/acies/arl-x-s-1_side-1.html"
          title="Nomisma.org"></iframe>
</div>
```


## Séquence d'images

<span class="smalltext"><https://iramat-apps.cnrs.fr/view/numismatic/1986.416.html></span>
```{=html}
<div class="iframe-figure">
  <iframe width="1000" height="500"
          src="https://iramat-apps.cnrs.fr/view/numismatic/1986.416.html"
          title="Nomisma.org"></iframe>
</div>
```

## Collection d'images

<span class="smalltext"><https://iramat-apps.cnrs.fr/view/iramat_iiif.html></span>
```{=html}
<div class="iframe-figure">
  <iframe width="1000" height="500"
          src="https://iramat-apps.cnrs.fr/view/iramat_iiif.html"
          title="Nomisma.org"></iframe>
</div>
```


## Aggrégation de collections (1/2)

<span class="smalltext"><https://iramat-apps.cnrs.fr/view/iramat_bnf_iiif.html></span>
```{=html}
<div class="iframe-figure">
  <iframe width="1000" height="500"
          src="https://iramat-apps.cnrs.fr/view/iramat_bnf_iiif.html"
          title="Nomisma.org"></iframe>
</div>
```

## Aggrégation de collections (2/2)

<span class="smalltext"><https://vikusviewer.fh-potsdam.de/muenzen/vis/></span>
```{=html}
<div class="iframe-figure">
  <iframe width="1000" height="500"
          src="https://vikusviewer.fh-potsdam.de/muenzen/vis/"
          title="Nomisma.org"></iframe>
</div>
```


## Exposition virtuelle

<span class="smalltext"><http://lotb.iath.virginia.edu/mirador_viewer/mirador?manifest=1&room_id=1></span>
```{=html}
<div class="iframe-figure">
  <iframe width="1000" height="500"
          src="http://lotb.iath.virginia.edu/mirador_viewer/mirador?manifest=1&room_id=1"
          title="Nomisma.org"></iframe>
</div>
```

## En résumé

<span class="smalltext"><https://iramat-apps.cnrs.fr/view/creuset.html></span>
```{=html}
<div class="iframe-figure">
  <iframe width="1000" height="500"
          src="https://iramat-apps.cnrs.fr/view/creuset.html"
          title="Nomisma.org"></iframe>
</div>
```

# Publier vos images en IIIF {background-image="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/iramat/iramat-dev/master/img/iiif-pres-collection-multi.png" background-opacity=0.2 background-size="400px" background-repeat="repeat"}

## Webservice hébergé à l'IRAMAT

<span class="smalltext"><https://iramat-apps.cnrs.fr/iiif-loader/></span>
```{=html}
<div class="iframe-figure">
  <iframe src="https://iramat-apps.cnrs.fr/iiif-loader/"
  style="
        transform: scale(0.9);
        transform-origin: 0 0;
        width: 1000px;
        height: 500px;
        border: none;
      "
      title="iiif-loader"></iframe>
</div>
```

## Présenter en IIIF


<span class="smalltext"><https://colab.research.google.com/drive/1WqEAez0yu4TYa5i-iNRHNIeYlv33nGPp#scrollTo=RPb_18dlpW2n></span>
```{=html}
<script src="https://gist.github.com/zoometh/d377fd9f20215e9dcead9e037e0b4bf3.js"></script>
```

# Développements prévus {background-image="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/iramat/iramat-dev/master/img/iiif-pres-collection-multi.png" background-opacity=0.2 background-size="400px" background-repeat="repeat"}

## Maturation logicielle

```{=html}
<div class="iframe-figure">
  <iframe width="1000" height="130"
          src="https://zoometh.github.io/thomashuet/img/research-software-maturity-levels-chat-3steps.html"
          title="maturation"></iframe>
</div>
```

<br>

<table style='font-size:70%'>
    <tbody>
        <tr>
            <td bgcolor="#66c2a4" style="color:#ffffff"><strong>1. Prototype</strong></td>
            <td bgcolor="#2ca25f" style="color:#ffffff"><strong>👉 2. Self-service</strong></td>
            <td bgcolor="#006d2c" style="color:#ffffff"><strong>3. CMS</strong></td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
            <td><strong>IIIF ponctuel</strong>. L’ingénieur assure le service informatique pour un projet particulier, pas d'automatisation possible.</td>
            <td><strong>IIIF réutilisable</strong> avec une documentation. Tâches de base automatisées. L’ingénieur assure les fonctionnalités avancées (ex : annotations, collections).</td>
            <td><strong>IIIF intégré</strong> à un CMS[^45]. Autonomie des tâches CRUD. L’ingénieur gère les utilisateurs et maintient le système.</td>
        </tr>
    </tbody>
</table>

[^45]: _Content Management System_, c.-à-d. système de gestion des contenus (ex : Omeka S, Drupal)



## Flux de données


```{mermaid}
flowchart LR
  subgraph IRAMAT[<b>IRAMAT</b>]
  	ICP{{ICP-MS}}
  	XRD{{XRD}}
	XRF{{XRF}}
    BD[(DB)]
    analyses[archaeometry analysis]
    analyses --> IRAMATdata
    analyses --> IRAMATimg
	subgraph VM[VM]
    subgraph IRAMATdata[Scalar measurements]
		XRF --> BD
		XRD --> BD
		ICP --> BD
        BD -- API RESTful --> APIdata[<em>labeled data</em>]
    end
    subgraph IRAMATimg[Imaging]
        Macro{{Macro-<br>photography}} -- format --> IIIFimg([IIIF image])
        Opt{{Optical<br>Microscopy}} -- format --> IIIFimg
        SEM{{SEM-EDS}} -- format --> IIIFimg
        Raman{{Raman}} -- format --> IIIFimg
        IIIFimg ---> IIIFpres([IIIF presentation])
		IIIFpres --> IIIFannot([IIIF annotation])
		IIIFannot -- manifests<br>annotations --> BD
        BD -- API RESTful --> APIimg[<em>labeled images</em>]
    end
	end
  end
  APIdata ---> PyExtract[<em>Data Fusion</em>]
  APIimg ---> PyExtract
  subgraph BSC[<b>BSC</b>]
    PyExtract -- creates --> MLlearn[(learning base)]
    subgraph ML[Machine Learning]
      MLlearn ---> MLvalid[validation]
      MLvalid ---> MLtest[test]
      MLtest --> MLlearn
    end
  end
    subgraph out[<b>Automatic Classification</b>]
      ResMet[archaeometallurgical facies]
      ResNum[numismatic coins]
    end
  ML ---> out

style BD fill:#cccccc

style IRAMAT fill:#edfa05
style VM fill:#f4fa82
style analyses fill:#fbfcd7
style IRAMATdata fill:#fbfcd7
style IRAMATimg fill:#fbfcd7
style XRF fill:#f6f7d5
style XRD fill:#f6f7d5
style ICP fill:#f6f7d5
style Macro fill:#f6f7d5
style Opt fill:#f6f7d5
style SEM fill:#f6f7d5
style Raman fill:#f6f7d5
style IIIFimg fill:#f6f7d5
style IIIFpres fill:#f6f7d5
style IIIFannot fill:#f6f7d5
style BD fill:#c9c9c9
style APIdata fill:#f6f7d5
style APIimg fill:#f6f7d5

style BSC fill:#919cfa
style PyExtract fill:#8794ff
style ML fill:#8794ff
style MLlearn fill:#d9ddff
style MLvalid fill:#d9ddff
style MLtest fill:#d9ddff

style out fill:#42ff70
style ResMet fill:#b0ffc3
style ResNum fill:#b0ffc3

click BD "https://github.com/iramat/iramat-dev/main/talks/2026-bsc/README.md#db"
click VM "https://github.com/iramat/iramat-dev/main/talks/2026-bsc/README.md#vm"
click IIIFimg "https://github.com/iramat/iramat-dev/main/talks/2026-bsc/README.md#iiif-image"
click IIIFpres "https://github.com/iramat/iramat-dev/main/talks/2026-bsc/README.md#iiif-presentation"
click IIIFannot "https://github.com/iramat/iramat-dev/main/talks/2026-bsc/README.md#iiif-annotation"
```

<div class="captiontext">_Data pipeline_ vers du Machine learning</div>
<br>

::: {.callout-note}
Utilisez la touche ALT + clic gauche pour zoomer/dézoomer sur le diagramme
:::

# Discussion {background-image="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/iramat/iramat-dev/master/img/iiif-pres-collection-multi.png" background-opacity=0.2 background-size="400px" background-repeat="repeat"}

## Récapitulatif
<br>
Webservice [iiif-loader](https://iramat-apps.cnrs.fr/iiif-loader/) pour héberger vos images en <img src='https://raw.githubusercontent.com/zoometh/thomashuet/master/img/lod-iso-iiif.png' style='height: 55px;vertical-align: middle;'> sur le site de l'IRAMAT (<https://iramat-apps.cnrs.fr/>)
<br><br>

<hr>

:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="80%"}
<br>
<img src='https://raw.githubusercontent.com/zoometh/thomashuet/master/img/app-github-3.png' style='height: 45px;vertical-align: middle;'> `https://github.com/iramat`[^101]
<br><br>
<img src='https://raw.githubusercontent.com/zoometh/thomashuet/master/img/app-zenodo.png' style='height: 45px;vertical-align: middle;'> `https://zenodo.org/communities/iramat`[^102]
:::

::: {.column width="20%"}
<br>
<span class="r-md" style="float:right">👉  [s'inscrire](https://github.com/signup)</span>
<br><br>
<span class="r-md" style="float:right">👉  [s'inscrire](https://zenodo.org/signup/)</span>
:::

::::

[^101]: code _open-source_, référentiels, données publiques, ...
[^102]: documents, édition/sélection des métadonnées,...

## Aclass {data-visibility=hidden}

Structure HTML

```html
/iiif/mirador/cdn/<collection>/<manifest>.json
```

Structure interne

[^10]: par exemple: [`iramat-dev`](https://github.com/iramat/iramat-dev) pour les généralités, [`numishare`](https://github.com/iramat/numishare) pour les projets en numismatique, [`almacir`](https://github.com/iramat/almacir/tree/hugo-files) comme exemple de site web orienté projet

## Demo {data-visibility=hidden}

<span class="smalltext"><https://projectmirador.org/demo/></span>

```{=html}
<div class="iframe-figure">
  <iframe width="800" height="470"
          src="https://projectmirador.org/demo/"
          title="projectmirador.org"></iframe>
  <div class="captiontext">présentation IIIF (c) projectmirador.org</div>
</div>
```

- creation de bases de références thématiques
